verdict: A highly rhythmic and engaging Medium chart with excellent vocal-syncing, slightly let down by a couple of mechanically awkward patterns.

issues.problem: Holding the Right (R) panel while requiring eighth-note steps on Down (D) and Up (U) forces the player into a rapid, one-foot eighth-note transition. This is too strenuous and physically awkward for a Medium-difficulty chart.

The rapid D -> U -> R -> D eighth-note stream causes either a double-step or an uncomfortable crossover (crossing the left foot behind the right to hit R) which disrupts the otherwise smooth flow of the chorus.
